caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" printed in gold across the chest is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm directly in front of him. To his left is a white banner featuring a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE." Behind him, a blue sign on the wall reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk sits a black mug with "THE TALK OUT LOUD" printed on it. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a consistent gaze toward someone off-camera to his left, though he slightly shifts his head and facial expression as he listens. The overall scene remains static with no significant changes in position or equipment.
